concept.core_loop: Turn-based arcane duel: each turn draw 5 spell cards, spend 3 mana to cast fire/ice/lightning cards against a telegraphed enemy, then end turn and the enemy acts. The live decision each turn is solving the enemy's telegraphed intent — set up Burn/Chill with fire/ice, then cash it in with lightning for bonus damage, while budgeting block vs offense. Between fights, pick 1 of 3 new cards to deepen the deck. Difficulty ramps across a ~5-node run (combat, combat, rest, elite+relic, boss). One excellent run, not endless.
mechanics: meta save: unlock 1 card + ascension toggle on boss win
concept.art_direction: Arcane-sigil SVG vector: deep indigo/violet base; element-accented spell cards (fire amber/orange, ice cyan/white, lightning electric-yellow/violet); runic circles, mana crystals, glowing sigils, glyph-bordered card frames with a cost gem and per-element sigil; a wide arcane-chamber background (indigo->violet gradient, glowing floor runic circle, floating motes) composed for the 1280x720 frame; distinct enemy silhouettes (imp, frost-wraith, golem, boss archmage). Feedback: cards arc to center on cast, number pop-ups, enemy hit-flash + screen shake scaled to damage, status icons with stack counts, enemy death dissolve.
concept.differentiation_notes: A tight, hand-crafted vertical-slice deckbuilder built around one discoverable hook — fire/ice set up a status, lightning cashes it in — rather than a wide card pool. Landscape-native (the project's first non-portrait title), so the fanned hand and card frames read large.

theme.premise: a lone mage's arcane duel through a sequence of monsters, casting elemental spell cards
theme.setting: a candle-lit arcane duelling chamber ringed with glowing runes

visual_system.world_bible: One candle-lit arcane duelling chamber of indigo-violet stone ringed with glowing runes (theme.setting), rendered as flat-bold cartoon. The four enemies are one summoned-monster family read by silhouette + element: imp (small horned bat-winged fire/amber), frost_wraith (tall hooded floating shroud, ice/cyan), golem (broad violet-stone construct with a glowing belt-core), archmage boss (robed sorcerer, pointed hat, rune-staff, lightning/violet). Spell cards are FIRST-PERSON CASTER POV — the spell leaving the mage's own outstretched hands inside the chamber — so each card reads as performing its ability (a TCG-hero throughline) rather than as an abstract sigil.
visual_system.stroke: checkpoint-native thick clean cartoon outlines + bold cel shading (Cartoon Arcadia XL); no hand-authored stroke
visual_system.form: full-bleed OPAQUE card illustrations (no painted frame — all chrome is code-drawn at runtime), composed as first-person caster POV; organic flat-cartoon creature silhouettes, one signature each (imp horns+wings+tail, wraith hood+shroud, golem belt-core, archmage hat+staff)
visual_system.shading: flat bold cel shading with vibrant local colour + soft glow on magical effects — Cartoon Arcadia native, one model everywhere
visual_system.scale: cards full-bleed at the 120x160 hand footprint / 140x190 reward footprint (masters ~768x1024, downscaled, mipmapped); enemies bottom-anchored on the floor line at ~350px (runtime scale, hitboxes untouched); background opaque full-frame 1280x720 (exact viewport aspect)
visual_system.prompt_scaffold: shared style fragment 'flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading, stylized modern arcane' + for CARDS a first-person caster-POV framing of the named spell leaving the hands in the chamber; for ENEMIES 'single centered subject, full body, clean transparent background'. Shared negatives: IP guards (logo, watermark, text, trademarked character, brand, celebrity likeness) + anti-realism (photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 3d render, octane render) + anti-scene for sprites (scene, multiple characters, frame, border, ground, shadow) + Western-not-anime (anime, manga).

style.style_prompt: flat bold cartoon, clean thick outlines, vibrant cel shading, stylized modern arcane

reskinned: card art: 16 full-bleed first-person caster-POV spell illustrations (arcane_bolt, ward, meditate, mana_surge, ember, flame_lash, immolate, wildfire, frost_shard, glacial_wall, freeze, blizzard, spark, chain_lightning, overload, thunderclap)
enemy:imp/frost_wraith/golem/archmage (4 flat-cartoon silhouettes; flash=overbright modulate pass, enrage=scale-pop, dissolve=alpha)
card_back (rune card-back for draw/discard pile stacks)
painted UI tokens: token_mana (mana crystal), token_shield (block shield), token_plate (medallion icon/value backing)
themed display font ui_font.ttf (Lilita One) wired project-wide (draw_string + Label overrides) so digits aren't ThemeDB-fallback programmer-art

element pips: per-element painted glyph on the card medallion (fire=flame, ice=shard, lightning=icon_lightning bolt, neutral=gem) replacing the single iridescent gem on every card — the pip now signals element by shape+colour (accessibility + fidelity)
warm/cool status discs: amber halo+tint for Burn, cyan for Chill, so the two shared-plate medallions read warm-vs-cool at a glance (was the same violet disc)
left_primitive: all juice/motion (screen shake, card-cast arc ghost, number pop-ups, death dissolve+particles, HP/mana tweens, status pulses, intent telegraph) — motion not art

ALL HUD/overlay chrome is DELIBERATE styled code, composited over the painted art so one renderer serves every card/state: the HUD plate (gradient body + accent strip + bevel + corner ticks), End Turn/Skip buttons (gradient + gloss + bevel), win/lose/reward banner panels, HP bars (player+enemy), the per-card legibility panels + name/type/effect text + element border + cost badge, and the MANA ORBS (bright radial code orb — the generated mana token rendered too dark/muddy). A painted 9-slice gold frame over these was tried this pass and owner-rejected in live play as lumpy/janky (generation will not yield a clean symmetric tileable frame) — clean styled code is the right call for wide dynamic UI chrome.
pile-count + status-count numerals, intent value, reward/win/lose overlay text — runtime values drawn on solid backing pills / tight outlines over the painted assets
asset_pass.notes: METHOD CHANGED svg->raster: the earlier SVG sigil-vector pass was owner-rejected as not-shippable ('rudimentary, fine for POC'); raster is the project default and the right call for representational creature/spell art, so this asset_pass record was reconciled to the shipped raster reality. KEY STYLE FINDING: Juggernaut XL (photoreal base) fought the flat-cartoon target through ~9 imp + ~9 card regens (whack-a-mole; the chain_lightning abstract effect kept collapsing to scenes) — swapping the CHECKPOINT to cartoonArcadiaXL_v2 did what prompt-tuning couldn't and solved cross-asset cohesion for free (every asset inherits one hand). Cards reframed first-person caster-POV to stop abstract-effect collapse and tie each spell to the world. SWAP MECHANISM: draw_texture*-in-place in the builder's single-_draw immediate-mode renderer (textures load once in _ready, replace primitives in _draw_background/_draw_enemy/_draw_card_face/etc., preserving z-order+shake+juice); every helper guards on a null texture and falls back to the primitive. Grain fixed via mipmaps/generate=true on every downscaled .import + TEXTURE_FILTER_LINEAR_WITH_MIPMAPS. Painted UI-token pass (mana/shield/plate + 6 icons + card-back + relic) holds code-drawn chrome to the painted-art bar. COMPOSITED + COLOUR-ACCESSIBILITY AUDIT (this pass, busy-state + reward-overlay screenshots, 3-4x magnified pairing crops): fixed block-value numeral contrast (was near-black on the shield's dark boss -> bright), added a solid backing pill behind the reward-overlay title (was gold-on-busy), pushed Burn/Chill count numerals clear of their medallion plates onto small backing pills (+ wider status spacing), and solidified the enemy name/intent/HP panel (0.66->0.82) over the bright runic portal; re-render re-audit clean. selftest still SELFTEST OK (rules untouched). RECIPE PROVENANCE: comfy.mjs takes the recipe JSON as a CLI arg and does not persist it, and the final Cartoon Arcadia recipes were not logged during the iterative probe, so exact per-asset seeds/negatives are unrecoverable; the committed PNGs are canonical (GPU gen is non-deterministic anyway). The recipes[] below record the locked checkpoint + proven params + per-asset subject as honest partial provenance (seed omitted where uncaptured); the full locked style profile lives in visual_system.style/prompt_scaffold. || VISUAL-AUDIT + TARGETED RASTER REGEN PASS (2026-06-04): the visual-audit skill graded the composited screen across all 5 states (busy combat / boss / reward / win / lose) via fresh per-lens auditors. CHROME-CODE fixes (logic frozen, SELFTEST OK): HP-bar value is now an OUTLINED numeral (no opaque pill punching a gap into the green fill — the segmented-bar bug, worst at boss 88/110); block-shield numerals white+heavy-outline (were grey-on-silver after the shield-token swap); status counts on solid pills + wider disc spacing (were touching the neighbour); reward screen draws ONLY bg+modal (the live combat header was bleeding through the scrim). ASSET-PRODUCTION fixes (owner chose full painted 9-slice): per-element card pips (icon_lightning bolt + reused flame/shard/gem) so the pip signals element by shape+colour instead of one rainbow gem; warm/cool element halo+tint on the Burn/Chill medallions; and a painted GOLD 9-SLICE FRAME (token_frame_gold) drawn via a manual nine-patch (_draw_nine_patch) over code fills, wrapping the HUD panel, win/lose banners, and End/Skip buttons. MIXED-METHOD HONESTY: wide dynamic UI chrome (HP-bar gauge, per-card legibility panels) fights LayerDiffuse generation (probes: black-box alpha button, emblem-in-center panel, 2-line hollow gauge) so they stay styled-code by design. Re-rendered + re-audited with fresh eyes after each fix; final sweep clean (mana orbs lifted to clear the new gold bottom rail). New PNGs: icon_lightning, token_frame_gold. || FRAME REVERT (2026-06-04, owner live-playtest feedback): the full painted 9-slice gold frame (token_frame_gold over code fills on HUD/buttons/banners) looked lumpy/janky in-game — asymmetric corners, uneven rails, stuck-on studs — because LayerDiffuse/SDXL will not yield a clean symmetric tileable UI frame. Owner chose to REVERT all panels/buttons/banners to the prior clean styled-code chrome (which sits cleanly); token_frame_gold deleted. ALSO this pass: mana orbs reverted from the painted token_mana (rendered dark/muddy on the dark panel) to a bright radial CODE orb (per the project gen-renders-mana-dark finding), and the HP-bar value outline tightened (spread 0.6) so it is not chunky. RETAINED wins from the regen attempt: per-element card pips (icon_lightning bolt + reused flame/shard/gem so the pip signals element by shape+colour) and the warm/cool Burn/Chill status medallions. LESSON: wide dynamic UI chrome (panels, buttons, bars) is a genuine medium-fight for raster gen — keep it styled-code (mixed-method honesty); reserve raster tokens for centered-subject art (cards, enemies, small element glyphs). selftest still SELFTEST OK.

recipes.name: bg_chamber
recipes.prompt: scaffold + a candle-lit arcane duelling chamber of indigo-violet stone ringed with glowing runes, glowing floor runic circle, pillars, depth
recipes.note: opaque full-frame background (no LayerDiffuse), exact 1280x720 viewport aspect to avoid squish. Exact seed/negative not captured.

recipes.name: enemy_imp
recipes.prompt: scaffold + single centered full-body small impish fire-demon, curved horns, bat wings, barbed tail, glowing amber eyes, ember aura, clean transparent background
recipes.note: flat-cartoon enemy sprite via LayerDiffuse RGBA. Exact seed/negative not captured.

recipes.name: enemy_frost_wraith
recipes.prompt: scaffold + single centered full-body tall hooded floating frost wraith, tattered icy shroud, cyan glow, clean transparent background

recipes.name: enemy_golem
recipes.prompt: scaffold + single centered full-body broad violet-stone golem construct, glowing belt-core, heavy fists, clean transparent background

recipes.name: enemy_archmage
recipes.prompt: scaffold + single centered full-body robed archmage boss, pointed hat, glowing rune-staff, violet lightning aura, clean transparent background

recipes.name: card_thunderclap
recipes.prompt: scaffold (CARD POV) + first-person view down the caster's two outstretched hands, a blast of violet-white lightning bursting outward in the arcane chamber
recipes.note: Representative of the 16 full-bleed POV card illustrations — same CARD scaffold + params, each with its own named-spell subject (fire/ice/lightning/neutral). Opaque full-bleed (chrome code-drawn). Exact per-card seeds/negatives not captured.

recipes.name: card_back
recipes.prompt: scaffold + an arcane spell card back, concentric violet rune circle, symmetrical, no text
recipes.note: shared draw/discard pile-stack back. Exact seed/negative not captured.

recipes.name: icon_lightning
recipes.prompt: flat bold cartoon vector game icon, a single zigzag thunderbolt lightning symbol, filled solid bright electric violet and glowing white, luminous neon bolt, thin clean outline, bold minimal flat icon, clean transparent background
recipes.negative: logo, watermark, text, photorealistic, 3d render, scene, multiple bolts, frame, border, ring, ground, shadow, anime, manga, mountain, soundwave, wave, blob, black fill, dark interior, hollow, gray interior, realistic, smoke, cluttered, gemstone, medallion
recipes.note: element pip + card-area glyph for the lightning element (reused as the lightning status/pip). Took 3 regens: an abstract bolt symbol collapsed to a glowing mound, then a black-filled bolt, before a bright white-core violet-glow bolt landed (micro-asset quality bar).
